Pixel to CM Converter

Convert between pixels and centimeters based on your screen's DPI (dots per inch). Essential for print design and accurate measurements.

FAQ

How many pixels are in 1 cm?

At 96 DPI (standard screen), 1 cm ≈ 37.8 pixels. At 300 DPI (print), 1 cm ≈ 118.1 pixels. It depends on resolution.

What DPI should I use?

Use 96 DPI for standard screens, 72 DPI for Mac displays, and 300 DPI for print materials.

Why does DPI matter?

DPI determines how many pixels fit in a physical inch. Higher DPI means more pixels per inch, resulting in sharper images.
